summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRACK-A-GAG tech jokes app. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend UI matches design requirements, authentication flow working, post creation successful. Minor authentication persistence issue detected in voting functionality.

integration_issues.issue: Authentication state not properly maintained during voting actions - triggers login modal unexpectedly

passed_tests: All 13 backend API endpoints (login, register, get posts, create post, voting, error handling)
Homepage loads with correct CRACK-A-GAG header and dark theme
Sidebar navigation with Trending/Top Ranked sorting
Authentication modal appears for unauthenticated actions
User login flow with existing credentials (techguy@example.com)
Add Post form with interest dropdown, title, content fields
Empty state display for clips tab
UI elements match provided design (dark theme, gradient buttons, proper spacing)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authentication state persistence issue in voting functionality - voting actions are triggering login modal even for authenticated users, suggesting token/session management needs improvement
